name: Basic Quiche Recipe
recipeInstructions:
Note: Swiss cheese may also be used, or a combination of Swiss and Cheddar cheese.
Combine all ingredients well; a wire whisk works best.
Add whatever vegetables you desire (broccoli, spinach, onion, peppers, mushrooms, etc.) and/or whatever meats you desire (bacon, ham, cold cuts, shrimp, etc.). All meats should be cooked and cut up or chopped, as should your vegetables.
Pour the entire mixture into a ready-to-bake pastry-lined pie pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 to 50 minutes. Cooking times will vary depending on the amounts and types of ingredients added. Quiche is done when the top is browning and the center has firmed up. Cool slightly before slicing, allowing the quiche to firm up.
Use your imagination to design your own special quiche.
